title: limonium oligotrichum
intro: Limonium oligotrichum, also known as Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Limonium oligotrichum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and calm the nervous system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for therapeutic purposes.
